title: 1.1: Tests that HandleFile correctly processes nested ZIP archives containing directories and files
1.2: Tests that HandleFile correctly extracts content from compressed tar archives
1.3: Tests that HandleFile correctly handles RPM package files
1.4: Tests that HandleFile correctly handles AR archive files
1.5: Tests that HandleFile correctly processes ZIP archives containing directories with files using testdir.zip
1.6: Tests that HandleFile correctly handles plain uncompressed TAR archives
2.1: Places the tests for HandleFile archive format handling in pkg/handlers/handlers_test.go
3.1: All tests use the Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests use testify/assert for assertions
3.3: All tests call HandleFile with context.Background() or a derived context
4.1: Follows the pattern of opening test files from testdata directory for archive format tests
4.2: Follows the pattern of using sources.ChanReporter for chunk reporting in HandleFile tests
